features.featureTitle: Update the RegistrationPage at '/registration' to include exactly two required input fields — 'In-Game Name' and 'Player ID' — along with a 'Proceed to Payment' button. The page must read match context (game mode, entry fee, prize pool) from sessionStorage (set by MatchCard on navigation) and display those details at the top of the form. All styling must follow the existing dark neon-red gaming theme (dark card background, neon red accents, Orbitron/Rajdhani fonts, neon glow on the button). A back-navigation option must be present to return to the Home screen.
